raw_text:
Luminox Labs

Designing intuitive digital experiences that empower users to accomplish more

Now Hiring: Manager, Frontend Engineering

Remote (US-based teams preferred) · Full-time · $210,000 - $270,000 USD annually

W

e're looking for a Manager of Frontend Engineering to lead our frontend platform team of 5-7 engineers.

This role combines hands-on technical leadership with people management responsibilities. You'll mentor

senior and mid-level engineers, drive architectural decisions, establish best practices for accessibility and web

performance, and directly contribute to high-impact features. You'll report to our VP of Engineering and partner

closely with product and design leadership.

A B O U T U S

Luminox Labs is a mid-stage SaaS company building modern analytics and workflow automation platforms for

enterprise teams. We're a 200-person, remote-first engineering organization with a focus on developer experience

and high-performance web applications. Since our founding in 2018, we've helped thousands of companies

streamline their operations through elegant, accessible interfaces.

Y O U R R O L E

Lead, mentor, and develop a team of 5-7 frontend engineers, providing clear technical direction, career growth

opportunities, and regular feedback

Establish and enforce frontend engineering standards, including accessibility compliance (WCAG 2.1 AA),

web performance budgets, and code review practices

Architect scalable component libraries and state management solutions using React and TypeScript, supporting

teams across multiple product lines

Drive adoption of Next.js for server-side rendering and static generation optimization, improving Core Web
Vitals and SEO across our platform

Conduct quarterly technical planning sessions to identify technical debt, refactor legacy code, and plan major

frontend infrastructure initiatives

Partner with product and design leaders to translate requirements into technical specifications and ensure

frontend feasibility in feature roadmaps

Implement comprehensive testing strategies using Jest, React Testing Library, and Cypress to maintain >80%

code coverage and prevent regressions

Represent frontend engineering in cross-functional architecture reviews and contribute to system design

decisions affecting multiple teams

 R E Q U I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

6+ years of professional frontend engineering experience, with at least 2 years in a people management or

senior technical leadership role

Expert-level proficiency in React and TypeScript, with demonstrated ability to mentor others in advanced
patterns and best practices

Strong foundation in web performance optimization, accessibility standards (WCAG), and core web vitals

(LCP, FID, CLS)

Experience building or scaling component libraries and design systems with Tailwind CSS or equivalent styling

solutions

Proven track record of owning significant technical decisions and communicating trade-offs to non-technical

stakeholders

Familiarity with build tools and bundling concepts (Vite, Webpack, or comparable), with ability to optimize

build times and bundle sizes

D E S I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

Experience with Next.js in production environments, including knowledge of SSR, ISR, and app router patterns

Background mentoring junior engineers or running engineering interviews and assessments

Knowledge of end-to-end testing frameworks like Cypress or Playwright for complex user workflows

Experience with monorepo tooling (Turborepo, Nx) and shared component distribution strategies

T O O L S  O F  T H E T R A D E

React 18+, TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Vite, Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress, Web Accessibility

(WCAG), Web Performance Optimization

W E O F F E R

Competitive health insurance (medical, dental, vision) with 100% premium coverage for employees

Generous professional development budget ($3,000/year) for conferences, courses, and certifications

Flexible work schedule and 25 days PTO plus 10 company holidays

Fully remote with option to work from our San Francisco office 1-2 days/week if desired

Equity package (0.3-0.8% depending on experience) with 4-year vesting and 1-year cliff

Annual performance bonus (15-20% of base salary)

Parental leave (16 weeks paid for all parents), sabbatical program after 5 years

Mental health support and $500/year wellness stipend

 T O A P P LY

Apply directly through our careers page at luminoxlabs.com/careers or send your resume and a brief note about

your management philosophy to careers@luminoxlabs.com. We review applications on a rolling basis.
nice_to_have: Parental leave (16 weeks paid for all parents), sabbatical program after 5 years
Mental health support and $500/year wellness stipend
